title: DSA Eligibility Criteria
body: Applicants must be enrolled on a qualifying higher education course and have a disability, long-term health condition, mental health condition, or specific learning difficulty that affects their ability to study.

title: Evidence Requirements
body: Applicants must provide evidence of their disability or condition from a qualified medical professional. Evidence must be dated within the last 12 months. Diagnostic assessments for specific learning difficulties must be conducted by a practising psychologist.

title: Cost Item Assessment Guidelines
body: Each cost item must be directly related to the applicant's disability-related study needs. Costs must be from approved suppliers where applicable. The maximum annual allowance is subject to the current DSA funding limits.

title: Escalation Policy
body: Cases where evidence has been outstanding for more than 56 calendar days must be escalated to a Team Leader for review. A reminder should be sent to the applicant after 28 days.

title: Compliance Check Procedures
body: Compliance checks must verify that the allowance is being used for the approved purposes. Spot checks should be conducted on a random sample of approved cases each quarter.
